Identity.Tooltip: Roman Legionaries were the backbone of the Roman Army during the late Republic and into the Empire phase. Javelineers gain +1 hack and 0.5 pierce resistance. Swordsman +5% hack/pierce attack and +0.5 hack resistance. They are 25% faster at building structures and gather meat and wood 15% faster but stone and metal 25% slower and take 10% additional train time.
